name: skill-secure-checker
description: 自动扫描技能代码，识别安全风险（恶意模式、密钥泄露、危险函数），支持 VirusTotal API 集成。适用于ClawHub发布前的自动安全审查。
details:
Skills must be secure before publishing. This scanner automatically detects:
- Malicious code patterns (eval, exec, __import__, subprocess with shell=True)
- Hardcoded secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens)
- Suspicious network operations
- OWASP Top 10 patterns
- Optional VirusTotal API integration for file reputation checks

Outputs: JSON report + optional HTML dashboard (beautified with frontend-design).
author: 小叮当

inputs.name: skill_path
inputs.description: Path to skill directory to scan (absolute or relative)

inputs.name: output_format
inputs.description: Report format: json, html, or both

inputs.name: virustotal_api_key
inputs.description: Optional VirusTotal API key for file reputation scanning

inputs.name: severity_threshold
inputs.description: Minimum severity to report: low, medium, high, critical

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Security scan results with findings count, risk score, and detailed issues

examples.title: 扫描一个技能目录
examples.description: Basic scan of skill directory, outputs JSON report

examples.title: 生成HTML报告（使用frontend-design美化）
examples.description: Scan and produce a beautiful HTML dashboard

examples.title: 启用VirusTotal文件扫描
examples.description: Include file reputation checks via VirusTotal API

error: If skill fails to load or run, provide troubleshooting tips: Check Python 3.8+, ensure skill_path exists, verify VirusTotal API key format if used.
